'''Jally''' was a muscular and extensively [[Tattoo/Legends|tattooed]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked as the right-hand man and bodyguard of [[Cash Garrulan]] on [[Murkhana/Legends|Murkhana]]. He used a [[DC-17m Interchangeable Weapon System/Legends|DC-17]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], he assisted [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Roan Shryne]] and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Olee Starstone]], who were trying to flee from [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]].
